category_sources: source_facts.description says it is the OCaml package manager; official manual at https://opam.ocaml.org/doc/Manual.html describes opam and its package file formats.
display_name_sources: Official site and manual use the name opam at https://opam.ocaml.org and https://opam.ocaml.org/doc/Manual.html; source_facts.name is opam.
docs_sources: Official opam documentation includes doc index, manual, usage page, and repository README at https://opam.ocaml.org/doc/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ocaml/opam, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official manual at https://opam.ocaml.org/doc/Manual.html identify opam as OCaml package/dependency management CLI tooling.
